response.text:
Yes — the frequency measurement is on the screen.

What I see:
- On the right measurement pane, there are two measurement tiles:
  - Meas 1: Frequency, μ: 7.855 MHz
  - Meas 2: Frequency, μ: 7.855 MHz
- The yellow waveform is visible on CH1.
- Scope settings shown:
  - CH1: 500 mV/div
  - Horizontal: 100 ns/div
  - Acquisition: Single

So the frequency measurement was definitely added, and it appears to have been added twice. If you want, I can remove the duplicate and leave just one frequency measurement.
